This Privacy Statement is effective as of July 2019
This Privacy Statement applies to all personal information we collect about you
We collect and process several types of personal information we receive from you depending on the ways you interact with us.
To understand the navigational trends on our website, we use third-party analytics tools which collect information which your browser sends when you visit our web page.
We want to know you better, so we can serve you better. But the choice of whether you want this kind of service is of course up to you.
We do not sell or license your personal information to third parties.
We recognize our responsibility to protect the personal information we collect. We make sure that our measures are in compliance with applicable data protection and data security laws.
We retain your personal information as long as it is necessary to fulfill the specific purposes, as explained under the section “Why do we collect your personal information”
